economic_notes: Band holds investments in 8 government business enterprises including Kalum Quarry LP, Kalum Gas Bar LP, Kitsumkalum Development LP, Kalum Logistics Park LP, Kasiks Wilderness Resort LP, Kalum Ventures LP, Kitsumkalum Economic Development Group Ltd., and Kalum Ventures Ltd. Port of Prince Rupert Container Terminal Project Agreement established trust fund for economic development.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) no budget was prepared for 2023 as required by PSAS, and (2) financial statements were not available for Kalum Ventures Ltd., Kalum Ventures LP, Kalum Gas Bar LP, and Kitsumkalum Economic Development Group Ltd., creating a limitation of scope on GBE investments. The Band adopted PS 3041 and PS 1201 effective April 1, 2022 resulting in remeasurement gains of $1,009,575 recognized in a separate statement. Three entities consolidated: Kitsumkalum Treaty Administration, Kitsumkalum Social Housing, House of Sim-Oi-Ghets. Eight GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + DFO + Province of BC + FNHA + Transport Canada + CMHC = 10965289+761846+2767575+1313808+77722+192313=16078553. Balance sheet detail (current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, TCA net book value) not fully extracted from available text.
